purpose: Human- or community-curated skill/tool indexes. These are discovery sources, not bulk-install allowlists.

rules.low_star_policy: A low-star repository may be accepted as a curated index only when it has focused scope, clear categories, many relevant linked projects, curation language, update activity, license or reuse clarity, no high-risk findings, and ideally an installable SKILL.md.
rules.install_policy: Install only an index skill or an individually selected skill folder after review. Never bulk-install every linked repository.
rules.individual_candidate_policy: Skills found through an index must still pass normal relevance, structure, license, maintenance, and safety checks.

indexes.name: awesome-ai-ppt
indexes.why: Focused curated list for AI PPT, PowerPoint automation, PPTX editing, and slide workflow tools. Useful as a screening shortcut even when star count is low.

indexes.name: awesome-codex-skills
indexes.why: Curated Codex skill index. Use it to find individual skill folders; do not install the whole index as a skill.

indexes.name: awesome-agent-skills
indexes.why: Large cross-agent skill index useful for discovery. Use individual candidates only after normal review.
